title: SDOH Screening in Primary Care Workflows
excerpt: SDOH Screening in Primary Care Workflows—a practical 2026 guide covering capturing social needs data during routine care, with actionable steps for teams and individuals.
bodyHtml:
SDOH Screening in Primary Care Workflows explores practical approaches to capturing social needs data during routine care. This guide focuses on measurable outcomes, clear ownership, and tooling that scales in 2026.

Why this matters now

Organizations are under pressure to deliver more with tighter budgets. Whether you run a clinic, a data platform team, or are navigating a lease, the goal is the same: reduce uncertainty and act on reliable information.

What you'll learn

  • How this topic fits into day-to-day decisions
  • Quick wins you can implement in the next 30 days
  • Common mistakes and how to avoid them
  • When to use Patientree AI vs custom engineering support

Implementation checklist

  1. Define the outcome and baseline metrics
  2. Map stakeholders, data sources, and constraints
  3. Run a small pilot with clear success criteria
  4. Review results and expand what works
  5. Operationalize with documentation and monitoring

Explore Patientree AI

Patientree AI, from Saabsa Solutions, helps teams move faster with less guesswork. For tailored architecture, integration, or product work, contact Saabsa Solutions.

Keyword focus: social determinants health.
